chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.D-680 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1.For orders on CMA No.3093/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection 3. For orders on CMA No.3094/2025 (Ex/A) 4. For orders on CMA No.3095/2025 (S/A) 5. For hearing of main case 14-5-2025 Mr. Imtiaz Ali Chadhar, Advocate for the petitioners.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgent application is granted. 2 to 5. Learned counsel for the petitioners is to satisfy as to the maintainability of the instant petition wherein quashment of FIR bearing Crime No.392/2025, registered with Police Station Abpara, Islamabad is sought, for which, this Court lacks jurisdiction to entertain the matter. On this, learned counsel for the petitioners, under instructions, does not press the instant petition with permission to file the same before the Court, having jurisdiction. In view of above, the instant petition stands dismissed as not pressed along with listed applications. However, the petitioner is at liberty to file a fresh petition before the Court, having jurisdiction. J U D G E J U D G E Naveed Ali
